sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتِ الأُسْرَةُ إِلَى المَطْعَمِ فِي العُطْلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je otišla u restoran za odmora.
sentences.translationEn: The family went to the restaurant during the holiday.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ كُلُّ فَرْدٍ مَا يُحِبُّهُ مِنَ الطَّعَامِ.
sentences.translation: Svaki član je naručio hranu koju voli.
sentences.translationEn: Each family member ordered the food they liked.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ الأَكْلِ جَاءَ الحِسَابُ وَكَانَ المَبْلَغُ كَبِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Nakon jela stigao je račun i iznos je bio velik.
sentences.translationEn: After eating the bill came and the amount was large.

sentences.arabic: قَسَّمَ الأَبُ الحِسَابَ بَيْنَ كُلِّ أَفْرَادِ الأُسْرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Otac je podijelio račun između svih članova porodice.
sentences.translationEn: The father divided the bill among all family members.

sentences.arabic: دَفَعَ كُلُّ وَاحِدٍ نَصِيبَهُ وَخَرَجُوا مَسْرُورِينَ.
sentences.translation: Svako je platio svoj dio i izašli su veseli.
sentences.translationEn: Each one paid their share and they left pleased.
